testcase.name: test_job_logs_stream

failure.message: AssertionError: job did not reach terminal state; statuses=['running', 'running', 'running', 'running', 'running'] assert False

testcase.failure: tests/backend_test.py:160: in test_job_logs_stream assert terminal, f"job did not reach terminal state; statuses={statuses[-5:]}" E AssertionError: job did not reach terminal state; statuses=['running', 'running', 'running', 'running', 'running'] E assert False

testcase.name: test_job_get_status

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 'running' in ('not_found', 'found', 'failed', 'stopped') + where 'running' = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfa4288bc0140>('status') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfa4288bc0140> = {'command': ['/root/.venv/bin/python', '-u', '/opt/btcrecover/seedrecover.py', '--no-pause', '--no-gui', '--disablesecuritywarnings', ...], 'error': None, 'finished_at': None, 'found_seed': None, ...}.get

testcase.failure: tests/backend_test.py:169: in test_job_get_status assert d.get("status") in ("not_found", "found", "failed", "stopped") E AssertionError: assert 'running' in ('not_found', 'found', 'failed', 'stopped') E + where 'running' = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfa4288bc0140>('status') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfa4288bc0140> = {'command': ['/root/.venv/bin/python', '-u', '/opt/btcrecover/seedrecover.py', '--no-pause', '--no-gui', '--disablesecuritywarnings', ...], 'error': None, 'finished_at': None, 'found_seed': None, ...}.get
